headline: Previously Rejected Articles Now Recovered

article_items.title: Company : TechCrunch AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] Google bets on Gemini to reinvent the smart home speaker Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : Google is betting generative AI can breathe new life into the smart speaker. The company's new $99.99 Google Home Speaker replaces the rigid commands of the Google Assistant era with more conversation Link :
